message:
feat: add agent workspace support to Genome

Add agentDir, saveAgentTool, saveAgentFile, loadAgentTools, and
listAgentFiles methods. Tools are saved with YAML frontmatter and
made executable. All mutations are git-committed.

Also fix pre-existing bootstrap agent count tests (5 -> 6) after
mcp.yaml was added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
